allow: PowerShell($ok = $false; foreach \($i in 1..20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; $ok = $true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { 'Dev server did not respond'; exit 1 }; "index: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $tex = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/textures/earth.jpg' -UseBasicParsing -Method Head -TimeoutSec 10; "texture: HTTP $\($tex.StatusCode\) \($\($tex.Headers['Content-Type']\)\)"; $mod = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/src/main.ts' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "main.ts transform: HTTP $\($mod.StatusCode\), $\($mod.Content.Length\) chars"; $earthMod = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173/src/scene/earth.ts' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "earth.ts transform: HTTP $\($earthMod.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem packages/conjunction-web/public -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, Length; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter stars.json -Recurse -Depth 2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Select-Object FullName, Length)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Directory -Filter 'test-data' | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName; Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, Length })

PowerShell($rows = Import-Csv test-data/socrates-sample.csv | Select-Object -First 10; $ids = @\($rows.NORAD_CAT_ID_1\) + @\($rows.NORAD_CAT_ID_2\) | Sort-Object -Unique; "IDs needed \($\($ids.Count\)\): $\($ids -join ', '\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://celestrak.org/NORAD/elements/gp.php?CATNR=$\($ids[0]\)&FORMAT=JSON" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; "probe $\($ids[0]\): HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { "probe failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
